positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map featuring stylized constellations, crescent moons, and flowing cosmic dust rendered in deep indigo, ethereal teal, and glowing gold line art. The composition should be centrally focused, creating a striking, clean silhouette suitable for large-format apparel printing. Incorporate stylized mountain ranges or abstract flora elements subtly integrated into the 'sky' to ground the design. High contrast, crisp linework, vaporwave aesthetic, woodcut etching style, isolated on a clean background.
